---
title: "Welcome to the Analytics track"
subtitle: "Real World Evidence Summer School 2026"
date: ""
format:
  revealjs: 
    theme: [simple, ../styleSS25.scss]
    incremental: true   
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
    margin: 0.07
    code-link: true
    code-line-numbers: false
    height: 900
    width: 1600
    footer: |
      <div style="position: relative; width: 100%;">
        <div style="text-align: center; font-weight: 500;">Real World Evidence Summer School 2026</div>
        <div style="position: fixed; top: 20px; right: 20px;"><a href="index.qmd" style="text-decoration: none;">⬅ Back to Practicals</a></div>
      </div>
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
editor: visual
---

## Welcome to St Hilda's

![](images/st_hildas.jpg){fig-align="center"}

## Aims of the analytics track

. . .

By the end of the week:

-   Be able to conduct descriptive analyses using R with data in the OMOP CDM format

-   Understand how to approach writing bespoke code for complex studies

-   Know where to look for help

## What to expect

. . .

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
<img src="images/programming.gif" alt="Programming gif" style="height: 600px;"/>
:::

## What to expect

. . .

-   Quarto presentations - most presentations correspond to an R package that works with data in the OMOP CDM format.

-   "Your Turn" exercises - during presentations where you can practice using the package (solutions will be on the next slide, but first try without looking at these!)

-   General practical - end of each day, which we will work on throughout the week.

## Post-It notes

. . .

-   Green - all good, no code currently running

-   Yellow - code running

-   Red - help me!

<br/>

. . .

![](images/BIEe.gif){fig-align="center" width="500"}

## Schedule - Monday

| Time          | Session                                       |
|---------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 13.30 - 14.30 | Introduction to OMOP and **CDMConnector**     |
| 14.30 - 15.00 | *Coffee break*                                |
| 15.00 - 15.45 | Characterising a database with **OmopSketch** |
| 15.45 - 16.30 | General practical                             |

## Schedule - Tuesday

| Time          | Session                                     |
|---------------|---------------------------------------------|
| 13.30 - 14.30 | Creating cohorts with **CohortConstructor** |
| 14.30 - 15.00 | *Coffee break*                              |
| 15.00 - 15.45 | Phenotype diagnostics with **PhenotypeR**   |
| 15.45 - 16.30 | General practical                           |

## Schedule - Wednesday

| Time          | Session                                               |
|---------------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| 13.30 - 14.30 | Add patient level data with **PatientProfiles**       |
| 14.30 - 15.00 | *Coffee break*                                        |
| 15.00 - 15.45 | Characterising cohorts with **CohortCharacteristics** |
| 15.45 - 16.30 | General practical                                     |

## Schedule - Thursday

| Time | Session |
|--------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| 13:30 - 14:30 | Conducting Drug Utilisation studies with **DrugUtilisation** |
| 14:30 - 15:00 | *Coffee break* |
| 15.00 - 15.45 | Estimate incidence and prevalence with **IncidencePrevalence** |
| 15:45 - 16:30 | General practical |

## Introductions

-   What's your name?

-   Where do you work? What is your role?

-   Have you used R before?

-   Have you worked with OMOP CDM data before?

-   What do you want to get from this week?

## Materials

You can find all the materials of the summer school in the following website: <https://oxford-pharmacoepi.github.io/RealWorldEvidenceSummerSchool2026/>

::: {style="position: relative; height: 800px;"}
<a href="https://oxford-pharmacoepi.github.io/RealWorldEvidenceSummerSchool2026/"
     target="_blank"
     style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 2;"> </a> <iframe src="https://oxford-pharmacoepi.github.io/RealWorldEvidenceSummerSchool2026/"
          width="100%" height="600px"
          style="border:none; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: 1;"> </iframe>
:::

</iframe>

## Set up

**USB**

-   Contains the datasets you will need

-   .....
